description: The operations team has announced a 2-hour delay for an upcoming flight. A customer service agent must inform the passengers.

nodes.task_description: Receive the delay information for the specific flight, including the new estimated departure time.
Generate the list of all passengers on the flight and their contact information.
Send an automated SMS and email notification to all passengers informing them of the delay.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully triggers the automated notifications.
